title: rubus pygmaeus
intro: Rubus pygmaeus, also known as the Dwarf Raspberry or Pygmy Raspberry, is a small, perennial shrub native to Asia, characterized by its edible fruit and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of vitamins and minerals. The health benefits of Rubus pygmaeus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, jam, or supplement, and can also be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
